perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a man with short brown hair wearing an orange jumpsuit; he has an exaggerated, wide-eyed facial expression and is shouting toward the camera. (2) A graphic showing a "GArmy" logo and another showing a YouTube video thumbnail appear briefly on screen as the man continues to gesture wildly and point. (3) A woman with long dark hair, also wearing an orange jumpsuit, enters the frame and sits next to him at a table covered with papers; they interact, with the man appearing to argue or explain something intensely while holding a stack of papers. (4) The man points directly at the camera and then back at the papers, his expression shifting between anger and triumphant laughter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, loud male vocals dominate the audio, speaking Mandarin and Taiwanese with an aggressive and excited tone. (2) An upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background track with strong percussion beats plays continuously. (3) A calmer female voice is heard briefly responding to the male speaker, creating a dialogue dynamic. (4) Sound effects (SFX) like sparkles or emphasis hits accompany the appearance of text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "網軍" (Internet Army) appears in large bold letters, expressing a central theme. (2) "又變成妳協助了!!" (It's become your help again!!) appears as decorative hook text with exclamation marks. (3) "GArmy" is shown as a brand logo. (4) "我組的!!!" (I organized it!!!) appears to emphasize the speaker's claim. (5) "有花錢才叫網軍" (It's only called an internet army if money is spent) serves as a functional summary of his argument.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro shouting -> Interaction/Argument with second person -> Conclusion/Point delivery.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main creator and 1 female companion present at the table.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man has short brown hair and wears a bright orange flight-suit style jumpsuit. The woman has long dark hair and wears the same orange jumpsuit.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio setting with teal-colored curtains and a desk containing papers, a smartphone, and a microphone stand.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-energy comedic commentary where the creator, Tsai A-ga, humorously distinguishes his fan group ('GArmy') from paid 'internet armies' (cyber trolls). He uses exaggerated expressions and loud delivery to engage the audience while responding to a perceived claim or misunderstanding regarding his community's influence.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: He is promoting his fan base 'GArmy' and his content channel through logos and thumbnails.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tsai A-ga's signature high-volume delivery, orange jumpsuit costume, and use of variety-show style large text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages Taiwanese internet slang and celebrity culture to create a highly relatable and viral-style short-form clip.
